PlayerBoard - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.model
 
PlayerBoard() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.model.PlayerBoard

processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.AskGameStatus
print on the screen the message and call the method askSetGameStatus() of the view
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.AskNickname
print the message and call the method askNickName() of the view
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.AvailableCharacterCards
print the message and call the method closeConnection() of the client
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.BlockOnCard
check if the player have to add o remove a block card from the character card 5
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.BlockOnIsland
print the message and block or unblock an island
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.ChosenCloud
print the message and call the method updateEmptyCloud() of the view sending it the cloud chosen
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.ChosenTower
print the message and call the method updateTowerColor() of the view sending it the color of the tower and the name of the player who chose it
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.Coins
print the message and call the method updatePlayerCoins() of the view sending it the coins taken
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.CurrentPlayer
print the message and call the method updateCurrentPlayer() of the view sending it the nickname of the current player
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.GameStatus
print the message and call the methods that sets the number of player and the mode
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.IgnoreColor
print the message and call the method updateIgnoredColor(color) of the view sending it the color to ignore
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.IgnoreTower
print the message and ignore (or reconsider) if on a specific island the tower must be ignored for the calculation of the influence
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.LoginFailedMessage
print the message and call the method closeConnection() of the client
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.Merge
print the message and say to the player which islands has been merged
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.MotherPosition
print the message and tell to the player the new position of mother nature
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.Notify
print the message
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.NotValidSupportCard
print the message and
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.PlayerOrder
print the message and communicate to the player the player order
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.Results
print the message and call the method showGameResults() of the view sending it the winners and the losers
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.ResumeTurn
 
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.ServerMessage
call the method showString() of the view
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.StudentsInDiningHall
print the message and call the method of the view that add or remove students from the dining hall
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.StudentsInHall
print the message and call the method of the view that add or remove students from the hall
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.StudentsOnCard
print the message and call the method updateStudentsOnCard() of the view
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.StudentsOnCloud
print the message and call the method updatePlayerCoins() of the view sending it the coins taken
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.StudentsOnIsland
print the message and call the method of the view that add students to a specific island
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.TeacherAssignment
print the message and call the method updateTeacher() of the views
processMessage(Client) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.messages.serverMessages.TowerColor
print the message and call the method updateTowerOnIsland() of the view sending it the island and the color of the tower

print the message and communicate to the client the character card to be showed and, if the boolean increasedPrice is true, to increase the price

print the message and
